body:
APPROVE
The bead is labeled `kind:investigation` with no acceptance criteria; the task is to document the root cause of the TLS failure. The merge commit brings in a docs commit that records the finding (TLS cert error caused by missing CA certs in the task container, same root cause as overfull-hbox), which satisfies the implicit investigation goal.
